docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF JOSE TORRES IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CEDRIC BERMOND IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARGARET WU; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
